Stone Soup

Stone Soup is a collaborative food writing project that brings together stories, recipes, and cultural perspectives from around the world.

The project explores how different cultures approach food, cooking, and sharing meals, drawing parallels between traditional practices and modern interpretations.

Project highlights:

  • Collection of traditional recipes
  • Food culture documentation
  • Community storytelling
  • Cross-cultural food research

© David McKenzie 2025
